mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (id, post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, reply_to_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{replyToUserId}, 1, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1
